title: RGU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for 03 Field Investigator Posts
description: Rajiv Gandhi University (RGU) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 03 Field Investigator Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Any Degree, Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the RGU Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
